content_of_post_to_comment: There is no such thing as progress or regress. The world is not getting better and better, nor is it getting worse and worse. It is simply moving along into the future,
comment: It kind of ignores that we do measure directional change in specific systems though—medicine, life expectancy, rights, etc. Even if 'the world' as a whole isn't heading toward a goal, locally we still see accumulations and regressions depending on what you track. Feels more like a framing choice than a fact.
